options.name: progression_balancing
options.description:
A system that can move progression earlier, to try and prevent the player from getting stuck and bored early.

A lower setting means more getting stuck. A higher setting means less getting stuck.

options.name: accessibility
options.description:
Set rules for reachability of your items/locations.

**Full:** ensure everything can be reached and acquired.

**Minimal:** ensure what is needed to reach your goal can be acquired.

options.name: include_level_completion
options.description: This makes completing a level into a location, adds 231 locations.

options.name: include_shortcuts
options.description:
If true makes shortcuts like cannons and 7-6 and 8-7 turn into locations.
Even if option is off will still disable shortcuts.

options.name: include_hintmovies
options.description:
Makes the hint movies in peach castles into locations, adds 65 locations.
If remove this then compensate with starter locations to keep #locations > #items.

options.name: randomize_coins
options.description:
If enabled will include 231 star coins as checks and star coins will be received as items.
If disabled will still create the star coins as ap items but place them in their vanilla locations.

options.name: include_inventory_powerups
options.description: A location that gets collected when you collect a powerup to your inventory, e.g. from a toad house or beating overworld enemy.

options.name: include_starting_locations
options.description:
Gives you an amount of free locations that are automatically checked.
This option is here to create a few free checks that helps with restrictive start errors.
Put to at least ~25 if you disable both check hint movies and check level completion and have IncludeNumberInventoryItems = 0
otherwise you can keep it at 0.

options.name: randomize_movement
options.description:
Will disable some of mario's moves until items checks are sent to reunlock them.
BETA FEATURE : expect bugs

options.name: dont_rando_move
options.description: Put movement items here if you want to play with movement except certain once.

options.name: randomize_powerups
options.description: Will make power ups not unlockable until items check are sent to reunlock them.

options.name: randomize_time
options.description:
Will make your starting time be separated into discreet section. Select O if you want to disable this option.
BETA FEATURE : expect bugs

options.name: bowser_star_unlock
options.description:
This setting applies requirements of at least x star coins to unlock final level
Recommended to have bellow ~ 200 to not get fill errors

options.name: bowser_world_unlock
options.description:
This setting applies requirements to unlock final level
Set this to amount of worlds needed to beat the game

options.name: logic_difficulty
options.description:
If hard will make locations that require glitches to be in logic,
recommended to normal.

options.name: logic_outside_powerup
options.description: Sett this to allow if you want solution involving bringing powerups from outside the level to be in logic.

options.name: starting_world
options.description: Select the world you want to start with, or keep it at random.

options.name: world9_unlock_condition
options.description:
Select in which way world 9 levels will be unlocked
Standard    : The games default unlock condition
Linear      : 9-1 req 10 SC, 9-2 req 20 SC, etc.
Gaussian    : The unlocking will be a gaussian distribution with mean = 100 SC and standard deviation = 30

options.name: amount_support_received
options.display_name: Amount Support items received from ap-items
options.description: This setting will set the amount of 1ups and powerups send to inventory when receiving their corresponding items.

options.name: filler_items
options.description: Select which filler items you want to have be possible to generate.

options.name: trap_items
options.description: Select which filler items you want to have be possible to generate.

options.name: trap_chance
options.description: Percentage chance that any given filler item will be replaced with traps.

options.name: death_link
options.description: Enable death-link as default, can be toggled in client.

options.name: enable_superpowers
options.description:
Not currently implemented
Adds extra powers like double jump to item pool

options.name: starcoin_collect_immediately
options.description:
If enabled will send checks for star coins directly when collected,
otherwise will send them on level completion

options.name: local_items
options.description: Forces these items to be in their native world.

options.name: non_local_items
options.description: Forces these items to be outside their native world.

options.name: start_inventory
options.description: Start with the specified amount of these items. Example: "Bomb: 1"

options.name: start_hints
options.description: Start with these item's locations prefilled into the ``!hint`` command.

options.name: start_location_hints
options.description: Start with these locations and their item prefilled into the ``!hint`` command.

options.name: exclude_locations
options.description: Prevent these locations from having an important item.

options.name: priority_locations
options.description: Prevent these locations from having an unimportant item.

options.name: item_links
options.description: Share part of your item pool with other players.

options.name: plando_items
options.description: Generic items plando.
